values.content:
You extract structured people data from search results. Return ONLY valid JSON. Schema:
{"people":[{"name":"string|null","title":"string|null","organization_name":"string|null","email":"string|null","phone":"string|null","source_url":"string|null","evidence":"string|null","confidence":0.0}]}

Rules:
- Extract real people with real titles only
- confidence 0-1 based on evidence quality
- If the person appears to be a new leader or recent hire, add is_leadership_change: true to the object

=Extract people from these search results:

{{ JSON.stringify($json.results.slice(0, 20)) }}
